# Forsvarsdepartementet

*15 lover*

| Lov | Korttittel | Lovdata | Historikk |
|-----|-----------|---------|-----------|
| [Lov om Etterretningstjenesten (etterretningstjenesteloven)](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/main/lover/lov-2020-06-19-77.md) | Etterretningstjenesteloven | [lovdata.no](https://lovdata.no/dokument/NL/lov/2020-06-19-77) | [log](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/commits/law-history/lover/lov-2020-06-19-77.md) · [v2020](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2020/lover/lov-2020-06-19-77.md) · [v2024](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2024/lover/lov-2020-06-19-77.md) · [v2025](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2025/lover/lov-2020-06-19-77.md) · [v2026](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2026/lover/lov-2020-06-19-77.md) |
| [Lov om Kystvakten (kystvaktloven)](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/main/lover/lov-1997-06-13-42.md) | Kystvaktloven – kystvl | [lovdata.no](https://lovdata.no/dokument/NL/lov/1997-06-13-42) | [log](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/commits/law-history/lover/lov-1997-06-13-42.md) · [v2001](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2001/lover/lov-1997-06-13-42.md) · [v2005](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2005/lover/lov-1997-06-13-42.md) · [v2010](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2010/lover/lov-1997-06-13-42.md) · [v2015](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2015/lover/lov-1997-06-13-42.md) · [v2020](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2020/lover/lov-1997-06-13-42.md) · [v2024](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2024/lover/lov-1997-06-13-42.md) · [v2025](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2025/lover/lov-1997-06-13-42.md) · [v2026](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2026/lover/lov-1997-06-13-42.md) |
| [Lov om Stortingets ombudsnemnd for Forsvaret (forsvarsombudsloven)](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/main/lover/lov-2021-06-18-115.md) | Forsvarsombudsloven | [lovdata.no](https://lovdata.no/dokument/NL/lov/2021-06-18-115) | [log](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/commits/law-history/lover/lov-2021-06-18-115.md) · [v2021](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2021/lover/lov-2021-06-18-115.md) · [v2024](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2024/lover/lov-2021-06-18-115.md) · [v2025](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2025/lover/lov-2021-06-18-115.md) · [v2026](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2026/lover/lov-2021-06-18-115.md) |
| [Lov om endringer i forsvarsloven mv. (fjerning av plikten til å fratre ved særal](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/main/lover/lov-2025-06-20-65.md) | Endringslov til forsvarsloven mv. | [lovdata.no](https://lovdata.no/dokument/NL/lov/2025-06-20-65) | [log](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/commits/law-history/lover/lov-2025-06-20-65.md) · [v2025](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2025/lover/lov-2025-06-20-65.md) · [v2026](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2026/lover/lov-2025-06-20-65.md) |
| [Lov om endringer i forsvarsloven mv. (militær disiplinærmyndighet)](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/main/lover/lov-2023-11-24-84.md) | Endringslov til forsvarsloven mv. (militær disiplinærmyndighet) | [lovdata.no](https://lovdata.no/dokument/NL/lov/2023-11-24-84) | [log](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/commits/law-history/lover/lov-2023-11-24-84.md) · [v2023](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2023/lover/lov-2023-11-24-84.md) · [v2024](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2024/lover/lov-2023-11-24-84.md) · [v2025](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2025/lover/lov-2023-11-24-84.md) · [v2026](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2026/lover/lov-2023-11-24-84.md) |
| [Lov om gjennomføring av tilleggsavtale mellom Norge og USA om forsvarssamarbeid ](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/main/lover/lov-2022-06-10-36.md) | Forsvarssamarbeidsloven | [lovdata.no](https://lovdata.no/dokument/NL/lov/2022-06-10-36) | [log](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/commits/law-history/lover/lov-2022-06-10-36.md) · [v2022](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2022/lover/lov-2022-06-10-36.md) · [v2024](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2024/lover/lov-2022-06-10-36.md) · [v2025](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2025/lover/lov-2022-06-10-36.md) · [v2026](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2026/lover/lov-2022-06-10-36.md) |
| [Lov om informasjon om bestemt angitte områder, skjermingsverdige objekter og bun](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/main/lover/lov-2017-06-21-88.md) | Lov om informasjon (skjermingsverdige objekter og bunnforhold mv) | [lovdata.no](https://lovdata.no/dokument/NL/lov/2017-06-21-88) | [log](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/commits/law-history/lover/lov-2017-06-21-88.md) · [v2017](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2017/lover/lov-2017-06-21-88.md) · [v2020](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2020/lover/lov-2017-06-21-88.md) · [v2024](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2024/lover/lov-2017-06-21-88.md) · [v2025](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2025/lover/lov-2017-06-21-88.md) · [v2026](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2026/lover/lov-2017-06-21-88.md) |
| [Lov om informasjonstilgang m.m. for Utvalget for evaluering av etterretningstjen](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/main/lover/lov-2025-06-20-66.md) | Lov om informasjonstilgang, evaluering av etterretningstjenesteloven | [lovdata.no](https://lovdata.no/dokument/NL/lov/2025-06-20-66) | [log](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/commits/law-history/lover/lov-2025-06-20-66.md) · [v2025](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2025/lover/lov-2025-06-20-66.md) · [v2026](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2026/lover/lov-2025-06-20-66.md) |
| [Lov om militær politimyndighet (militærpolitiloven)](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/main/lover/lov-2023-11-24-85.md) | Militærpolitiloven | [lovdata.no](https://lovdata.no/dokument/NL/lov/2023-11-24-85) | [log](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/commits/law-history/lover/lov-2023-11-24-85.md) · [v2023](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2023/lover/lov-2023-11-24-85.md) · [v2024](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2024/lover/lov-2023-11-24-85.md) · [v2025](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2025/lover/lov-2023-11-24-85.md) · [v2026](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2026/lover/lov-2023-11-24-85.md) |
| [Lov om militære rekvisisjoner [rekvisisjonsloven]](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/main/lover/lov-1951-06-29-19.md) | Rekvisisjonsloven | [lovdata.no](https://lovdata.no/dokument/NL/lov/1951-06-29-19) | [log](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/commits/law-history/lover/lov-1951-06-29-19.md) · [v2001](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2001/lover/lov-1951-06-29-19.md) · [v2005](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2005/lover/lov-1951-06-29-19.md) · [v2010](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2010/lover/lov-1951-06-29-19.md) · [v2015](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2015/lover/lov-1951-06-29-19.md) · [v2020](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2020/lover/lov-1951-06-29-19.md) · [v2024](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2024/lover/lov-1951-06-29-19.md) · [v2025](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2025/lover/lov-1951-06-29-19.md) · [v2026](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2026/lover/lov-1951-06-29-19.md) |
| [Lov om omdanning av Aerospace Industrial Maintenance Norway SF til aksjeselskap](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/main/lover/lov-2016-06-17-44.md) | Lov om omdanning av AIM Norway SF til aksjeselskap | [lovdata.no](https://lovdata.no/dokument/NL/lov/2016-06-17-44) | [log](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/commits/law-history/lover/lov-2016-06-17-44.md) · [v2016](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2016/lover/lov-2016-06-17-44.md) · [v2020](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2020/lover/lov-2016-06-17-44.md) · [v2024](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2024/lover/lov-2016-06-17-44.md) · [v2025](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2025/lover/lov-2016-06-17-44.md) · [v2026](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2026/lover/lov-2016-06-17-44.md) |
| [Lov om oppfinnelser av betydning for rikets forsvar](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/main/lover/lov-1953-06-26-8.md) | Lov om forsvarsviktige oppfinnelser | [lovdata.no](https://lovdata.no/dokument/NL/lov/1953-06-26-8) | [log](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/commits/law-history/lover/lov-1953-06-26-8.md) · [v2001](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2001/lover/lov-1953-06-26-8.md) · [v2005](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2005/lover/lov-1953-06-26-8.md) · [v2010](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2010/lover/lov-1953-06-26-8.md) · [v2015](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2015/lover/lov-1953-06-26-8.md) · [v2020](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2020/lover/lov-1953-06-26-8.md) · [v2024](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2024/lover/lov-1953-06-26-8.md) · [v2025](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2025/lover/lov-1953-06-26-8.md) · [v2026](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2026/lover/lov-1953-06-26-8.md) |
| [Lov om statsbidrag til anlegg m.v. av skytebaner](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/main/lover/lov-1974-04-05-14.md) | Lov om statsbidrag til skytebaner | [lovdata.no](https://lovdata.no/dokument/NL/lov/1974-04-05-14) | [log](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/commits/law-history/lover/lov-1974-04-05-14.md) · [v2001](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2001/lover/lov-1974-04-05-14.md) · [v2005](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2005/lover/lov-1974-04-05-14.md) · [v2010](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2010/lover/lov-1974-04-05-14.md) · [v2015](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2015/lover/lov-1974-04-05-14.md) · [v2020](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2020/lover/lov-1974-04-05-14.md) · [v2024](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2024/lover/lov-1974-04-05-14.md) · [v2025](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2025/lover/lov-1974-04-05-14.md) · [v2026](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2026/lover/lov-1974-04-05-14.md) |
| [Lov om undersøkelser av ulykker og hendelser i Forsvaret (forsvarsundersøkelsesl](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/main/lover/lov-2016-12-16-92.md) | Forsvarsundersøkelsesloven | [lovdata.no](https://lovdata.no/dokument/NL/lov/2016-12-16-92) | [log](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/commits/law-history/lover/lov-2016-12-16-92.md) · [v2016](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2016/lover/lov-2016-12-16-92.md) · [v2020](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2020/lover/lov-2016-12-16-92.md) · [v2024](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2024/lover/lov-2016-12-16-92.md) · [v2025](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2025/lover/lov-2016-12-16-92.md) · [v2026](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2026/lover/lov-2016-12-16-92.md) |
| [Lov om verneplikt og tjeneste i Forsvaret m.m. (forsvarsloven)](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/main/lover/lov-2016-08-12-77.md) | Forsvarsloven | [lovdata.no](https://lovdata.no/dokument/NL/lov/2016-08-12-77) | [log](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/commits/law-history/lover/lov-2016-08-12-77.md) · [v2016](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2016/lover/lov-2016-08-12-77.md) · [v2020](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2020/lover/lov-2016-08-12-77.md) · [v2024](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2024/lover/lov-2016-08-12-77.md) · [v2025](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2025/lover/lov-2016-08-12-77.md) · [v2026](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2026/lover/lov-2016-08-12-77.md) |
